de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache
  • Enclosing class:
    RecoderModelTransformer

    public static class RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache
extends java.lang.Object
    Cache of important data. This is done mainly for performance reasons. It contains the following info: - list of comp. units - their class declarations - a mapping from local classes to their needed final variables. Objects are created upon the first request.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TransformerCache(java.util.List<CompilationUnit> cUnits)

      java.util.HashMap<ClassType,java.util.List<Variable>> getLocalClass2FinalVarMapping() 
      java.util.List<CompilationUnit> getUnits() 
      protected void init() 
      void invalidateClasses()
      if the class declaration set changes, the cache must be invalidated
